headline: Senior ML Engineer | LLMs | RAG | LangChain | LangGraph | 6 Years
summary: Senior ML Engineer with 6 years of experience building production LLM systems. Led a team of 5 engineers delivering RAG pipelines and multi-agent systems at scale. Reduced manual effort by 60% through intelligent automation. Published 2 papers on efficient transformer architectures. Strong communicator with experience presenting to C-suite stakeholders.
experience_text: - Designed and deployed LLM-based agent platform using LangGraph and AutoGen. Built RAG pipeline serving 10M+ queries/day using Pinecone and FastAPI. Led MLOps infrastructure on Kubernetes with MLflow model tracking. Mentored 5 junior engineers and led weekly architecture reviews.
